response.justification: Strong full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, current TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling that directly matches the AI agent development requirement. Solid background across React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and multiple languages (TypeScript, Java, Python-adjacent via DLang/C++). Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience, and React depth is less prominent than backend work, but the foundation and craftsmanship signals (TDD, pairing, workshops) make this a clear interview.
strengths: Current hands-on TypeScript/Node.js plus AI-agent and MCP infrastructure work directly aligns with stack and AI requirement
13+ years across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput microservices with strong TDD/craftsmanship culture
Broad polyglot experience (TS, Java, C/C++, DLang) plus AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, and Git fluency
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned; testing background skews toward Jest/Selenium and D-lang tooling
React exposure appears limited compared to backend depth; frontend seniority signal is moderate
No Kotlin experience listed for the secondary stack requirement

key_factors.factor: AI-agent and MCP experience at current role
Depth of TypeScript/Node.js plus craftsmanship track record
Missing Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifics
